inherited_exposed_failure: AVAX/DOT/NEAR perpetual monthly 90d long-short 0.5x: development +27.41%, max drawdown -82.87%, adverse -63.99%, DOES_NOT_SUPPORT
question: Can a fixed three-altcoin spot monthly positive-90-day-momentum long/cash portfolio earn positive independent-evaluation returns and preserve capital in confirmation so the combined untouched period remains profitable?
development_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress total >0; max drawdown >-40% and >=15 percentage points better than 0.5x long; 60d and 120d base >0; turnover <=20
evaluation_gate: 90d base/stress total >0; at least one positive year; max drawdown >-40% and below 0.5x long; 60d and 120d base >0
confirmation_gate: 90d base/stress >=-5%; max drawdown >-25% and below 0.5x long; 60d and 120d base >=-5%; compounded evaluation+confirmation >0
holdout_release_rule: Run exposed development after checkpoint; fetch evaluation only after it passes; fetch confirmation only after fixed evaluation passes
